decision.selfmall_amount_rule_v0_2: Toss/store=coffee reportable net + VM Cloud NPay actual. siteConfirmedRevenue는 광고/유입 ledger confirmed 후보라 자사몰 결제수단 합계에 더하지 않는다.
decision.weekly_status: Toss known minimum only. NPay weekly amount is pending because the public summary exposes NPay actual as 30d only.
decision.monthly_status: Toss 30d + NPay actual 30d can be used as self-mall included-with-warning amount.
decision.playauto_role: 아임웹-C 주문/상품/배송 cross-check. pay_amt가 0이라 amount source가 아니다.
decision.site_confirmed_revenue_role: diagnostic only for current report; do not sum with Toss/NPay.
decision.toss_reconcile_endpoint_warning: /api/crm-local/imweb/toss-reconcile has useful aggregate coverage but includes raw samples in response. Slack/report automation must use aggregate-only wrapper.

playauto_toss_bridge.join_type: order base contained in PlayAuto shop_ord_no; aggregate only

npay_actual.reason: VM Cloud public summary currently returns NPay actual 30d, not weekly window.

playauto_toss_bridge.join_type: order base contained in PlayAuto shop_ord_no; aggregate only

selfmall_reportable.pending_other_rails: possible non-Toss non-NPay rows remain in Imweb/Toss reconcile missing bucket

diagnostic_only.reason: attribution ledger confirmed candidate; undercounts vs Toss+NPay and should not be summed.

next_actions.action: VM Cloud NPay actual weekly aggregate endpoint or read-only query path
aggregate-only Toss reconcile wrapper for report automation
